description: A parent with a child of the opposite gender needs access to a family restroom.

nodes.task_description: Receive the request from the guest.
Provide the guest with the location of the nearest family restroom.

expected_outcome.value: Agent directs the guest to the correct location.

nodes.task_description: If the restroom is locked for security, dispatch a staff member to unlock it for the guest.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends an usher to provide access.
